attributes.name: The Astral Gardens Experience Overview
attributes.summary: The AstralGardens listing provides a visual presentation of The Astral Gardens installation experience, highlighting its name, tagline, description, schedule, pricing, and location. It emphasizes an immersive cosmic environment with animated visual themes and interactive navigation. The listing is designed to inform users about different experience sections, including luminous, crystalline, nebula, and stellar themes, each with detailed descriptions and durations. It includes options to begin the experience, explore further details, and reserve spots, catering to users interested in booking or learning more about the installation. The layout adapts to various formats such as app, card, and embedded views, ensuring clear dissemination of experience information and promoting engagement.
